final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing banner for a Weibo news/hot topic post, featuring an urban dusk skyline scene.

Style/medium: documentary photojournalism, smartphone-captured editorial photography, realistic field aesthetic with dramatic chiaroscuro
Composition: wide panoramic banner 16:9 aspect ratio, horizontal layout with generous negative space for text overlay, eye-level street perspective
Subject: silhouetted pedestrians in hurried motion, urban street life captured candidly
Scene/backdrop: city skyline at dusk, skyscrapers reflecting golden sunset glow, neon signs beginning to illuminate, layered depth from foreground street to distant towers
Lighting/mood: dramatic contrast between warm sunset light and cool neon glow, golden hour transitioning to artificial light, moody and authentic
Color palette: warm amber and gold from sunset reflections, cool cyan and magenta from neon accents, deep shadows in foreground
Materials/textures: gritty urban surfaces, glass building reflections, motion blur on moving figures
Text (verbatim): "城市里的安静时刻" (large headline, bold/modern font), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (subtext), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (watermark, bottom or lower right)
Constraints: horizontal panoramic format with ample留白 for text placement; must read as authentic social media news banner
Avoid: 8K stuffer language, plastic skin, oversaturated HDR, stock photo aesthetic, deformed architecture, watermark conflicts with main text
